{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323200307FC785A8EC230B7A29EE0"}"},"total":1871},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7589577606347506457","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看了这么多本班级求生文[吃瓜]这一本是我第一本追读到最新章节的[吃瓜][吃瓜]没有前女友剧情，没有队友过于无脑剧情，主角从一开始的有些犹豫性格到现在的果断性格，收女一个个来都有迹可循[吃瓜][吃瓜]剧情内容的话还是可以的，整体而言虽然偶尔有些不喜欢的地方，不过影响不大[吃瓜][吃瓜]希望后面保证质量，多多更新。","text_exts":[{"e":10,"s":6,"text":"班级求生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%8F%AD%E7%BA%A7%E6%B1%82%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774267387B7A29EE0%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227589577606347506457%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227576318832952740889%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%8F%AD%E7%BA%A7%E6%B1%82%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":44,"s":41,"text":"前女友","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%89%8D%E5%A5%B3%E5%8F%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774267387B7A29EE0%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227589577606347506457%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227576318832952740889%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%89%8D%E5%A5%B3%E5%8F%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767089862,"group_id":"7576318832952740889","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9wWURpAuhjhhCfHcQEVfaU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/dc7ad19f7a9d497eb164bbef33d047f5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795364&x-signature=uYyES0rcgTmFxmoudKucPm4ydVg%3D","user_id":"6784493170","user_name":"唯爱水晶宫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"6784493170","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7576318832952740889","book_info":{"abstract":"【公交车求生】【多】【S级天赋】【不圣母】【新题材】
全球百亿人进行公交车求生，有组织的，都随着组织进行求生，分为班级组、公司单位组、部门组、或者社团组、科研实验室小组等等。

每个组织30人至50人穿越到一辆公交车内，进行公交车求生。

而顾平生所在的公交车内，因为大学专业的缘故，除了他自己以外，都是女同学...

而他和好几个女同学，居然好运觉醒了不错的天赋！

他顾平生开局获得了S级天赋，每日签到，每生存签到一天，都可以选择一份奖励，奖励包罗万象，甚至可以是新的天赋。

而其他女同学，学委李若瑶开局获得了S级天赋超强体质，体质是常人的十倍，并且增幅也将是十倍。

团支书林秋楠开局获得了S级天赋，神提示，神提示可以洞察任何物品的信息。

生活委员洛小雪开局获得了A级治疗术...

文体委员张可可开局获得了B级巨大化...

科创委员...

靠着顾平生和女同学们的厉害天赋，顾平生如同度假一样，和女同学们在新世界不断奔波。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eb03db9c1062b46e153bc954afc75b09","author":"倒霉蛋阿古朵","author_id":"","book_id":"7576318832952740889","book_name":"班级公交求生：我一车美女大学生","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"17.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7576320943555887641","read_count":"176619","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"745269"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"344","tags":"游戏体育,穿越,多女主,网游,求生,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2bf3da168c049202c7bdd6ea6349b95c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779451387&x-signature=iQ5cWFl06QncScV%2FNnQph5M9pZs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"106680318858","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"130"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323200307FC785A8EC230B7A29EE0"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":28,"fo
